# Albert Hofman

Stephen B. Kay Family Professor of Public Health and Clinical Epidemiology

Epidemiology, Harvard T.H. Chan School of Public Health

Departments

Epidemiology, Harvard T.H. Chan School of Public Health

## Biography

Albert Hofman, MD, PhD is the Chair of the Department of Epidemiology and the Stephen B. Kay Family Professor of Public Health and Clinical Epidemiology at the Harvard T.H. Chan School of Public Health in Boston, Massachusetts (USA). Dr. Hofman was the chairman of the department of Epidemiology of the Erasmus Medical Center/Erasmus University Rotterdam, The Netherlands, from 1988 until 2016. He has been science director of the graduate school Netherlands Institute for Health sciences (Nihes) since its start in 1990 until 2015.

[Albert's Catalyst Profile](https://connects.catalyst.harvard.edu/Profiles/display/Person/44340)

NPJ Digit Med 2026 Feb 17

* ### [Prenatal folate, homocysteine and vitamin B12 levels and child brain volumes, cognitive development and psychological functioning: the Generation R Study - CORRIGENDUM.](http://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pubmed/41626701)

  PMID: 41626701
* ### [The rapid growth in Mendelian randomization studies.](http://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pubmed/41196509)

  PMID: 41196509
* ### [Effect of transabdominal versus transvaginal cerclage on preterm birth and neonatal outcomes among patients with a history of cervical insufficiency.](http://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pubmed/40645472)

  PMID: 40645472
* ### [Plasma microRNA signatures of aging and their links to health outcomes and mortality: findings from a population-based cohort study.](http://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pubmed/40563098)
